name: pdf-to-md
description: Convert PDF files into clean, structured Markdown inside VS Code with structure preservation, image extraction, and configurable settings.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration

pdfToMarkdown.preserveLayout.description: Retain original spacing and line breaks from the PDF.

pdfToMarkdown.detectTables.description: Enable heuristic table detection to produce Markdown tables.

pdfToMarkdown.mergeLines.description: Merge text fragments broken across lines into coherent paragraphs.

pdfToMarkdown.outputFolder.description: Default output folder for converted Markdown files. Empty = same folder as source PDF.

pdfToMarkdown.engine.description: Extraction backend. 'mupdf' (default) uses the bundled MuPDF WASM engine. 'pdfjs' uses the legacy pdfjs-dist heuristics. 'pythonSidecar' shells out to a local Python install with pymupdf4llm for the highest fidelity on research papers.

pdfToMarkdown.extractImages.description: Image extraction mode. 'inline' writes images and inserts Markdown links. 'folder-only' writes images but does not insert links. 'none' skips image extraction entirely.

pdfToMarkdown.imageMinSize.description: Minimum width/height in pixels to extract an image; smaller images are treated as decorative and skipped.

pdfToMarkdown.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter for the 'pythonSidecar' engine. Empty = use 'python' from PATH.
